svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="告警分级降噪" id="obsAlert"> <mxGraphModel dx="-444" dy="-111" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="告警降噪：从「一天几百条全免打扰」到「只剩几条条条值得点开」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="190" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BAD" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="反模式：什么异常都进飞书群
一天刷几百条 → 半个月全员免打扰
告警通道等于废了" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="280" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ARROW" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="降噪" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="330" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GOOD" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="分级 + 去重 → 一天几条
每条 actionable，通道重新生效" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="280" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="324" y="95" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="396" y="95" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="业务阈值告警（后端每 5 分钟算）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="320" x="40" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="支付成功率 < 95%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="200" x="40" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="退款失败率 > 10%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="250" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="结算在途 > 2 小时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="440" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="去重：慢 SQL 同一 digest 30 分钟内不重复告警，落 slow_query_log 表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="580" x="40" y="228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="好告警 = actionable：收到就能立刻动手；收到还得想「这要不要管」的，都是噪音" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="680" x="120" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 420px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 告警降噪：从「一天几百条全免打扰」到「只剩几条条条值得点开」

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 81px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #64748b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#64748b, #7e8c9f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
反模式：什么异常都进飞书群
一天刷几百条 → 半个月全员免打扰
告警通道等于废了
